ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java import some from dw::core::Arrays --- keysOf(payload) some ((key) -> !(['mealType', 'consumedAt'] contains (key as String)))

validation:is-false.doc:name: Check Meal Id
validation:is-false.message: Invalid meal Id format. Must be a valid UUID.

validation:is-false.doc:name: Can only modify mealType or consumedAt
validation:is-false.message: Can only modify mealType or consumedAt

db:select.doc:name: Select meal_id
db:select.db:sql: SELECT meal_id from meals where meal_id = :mealId AND user_id = :userId AND deleted_at IS NULL

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-404", message: "No data found for the provided user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"}, originLayer: "system" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var base = "UPDATE meals " var Clause = if ( payload.mealType != null and payload.consumedAt == null ) " SET meal_type = :mealType " else if ( payload.consumedAt != null and payload.mealType == null ) " SET consumed_at = :consumedAt" else "SET meal_type = :mealType, consumed_at = :consumedAt " var endClause= " WHERE meal_id = :mealId AND user_id = :userId AND deleted_at IS NULL" --- base ++ Clause ++ endClause

db:select.doc:name: Select meals
db:select.db:sql: SELECT m.meal_id, m.user_id, m.meal_type, m.consumed_at, m.logged_at as meal_logged_at, mi.item_id, mi.food_id, mi.portion_id, mi.portion_amount, mi.quantity_g, mi.logged_at as item_logged_at FROM meals m LEFT JOIN meal_items mi ON m.meal_id = mi.meal_id WHERE m.meal_id = :meal_id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND (mi.deleted_at IS NULL OR mi.item_id IS NULL)

logger.doc:name: Update Complete
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Meal updated' var userId = { userId: vars.userId as String, mealId: vars.mealId as String } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("INFO",logMessage,userId, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 import transformMeal from dwl::transforms output application/json --- transformMeal(payload)

logger.doc:name: Invalid Body
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: "Payload received is invalid", userId: vars.userId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","Validation Not Successful",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "MEALS-LOG-400", message: error.description replace("\n") with (" and "), correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.doc:name: PATCH meal failed
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId, mealId: vars.mealId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","PATCH meal failed",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "Meal-500", message: "An error occurred updating meal item", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
